heading: Administration, protection, and development
label: 460m–12 Administration, protection, and development
text: The Secretary shall administer, protect, and develop the Buffalo National River in accordance with the provisions of the Act of (; et seq.), as amended and supplemented; except that any other statutory authority available to the Secretary for the conservation and management of natural resources may be utilized to the extent he finds such authority will further the purposes of this subchapter.August 25, 191639 Stat. 53516 U.S.C. 11See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThe Act of (; et seq.), referred to in text, is , , known as the National Park Service Organic Act, which enacted sections 1, 2, 3, and 4 of this title and provisions set out as a note under , National Park Service and Related Programs. Sections 1 to 4 of the Act were repealed and restated as , Crimes and Criminal Procedure, and section 100101(a), chapter 1003, and sections 100751(a), 100752, 100753, and 102101 of Title 54 by , §§ 3, 4(a)(1), 7, , , 3260, 3272.
